title: October
content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}} {{Month|October}}
'''October''' is the tenth month of the year in the [[Wikipedia:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]. It has 31 days.

*'''Oct 3 ''' – "[[Teach You, I Will]]" airs on YouTube in 2017.
*'''Oct 4 ''' – "[[The Starfighter Stunt]]" airs on YouTube in 2017.

*'''Oct 30''' – "[[Chapter 9: The Marshal]]" airs on Disney+ in 2020.

==Video game releases==
*'''Oct 1''' – [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' video game]] is released on the [[Wikipedia:Microsoft Windows|PC]] platform in 1997.
*'''Oct 1''' – ''[[Star Wars: Masters of Teräs Käsi]]'' is released on the [[Wikipedia:PlayStation|Playstation]] platform in 1997.
*'''Oct 14''' – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Galactic Strongholds]]'' released on the [[Wikipedia:Microsoft Windows|PC]] platform in 2014.
*'''Oct 20''' – ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'' released on the [[Wikipedia:Nintendo GameCube|GameCube]] platform in 2003.
*'''Oct 24''' – ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' is released on the PC platform in 2006.
*'''Oct 28''' – ''[[Star Wars: DroidWorks]]'' is released on the PC platform in 1998.

==Events concerning [[Wookieepedia]]==
*'''Oct 16''' – [[Jedipedia]] ([[Wikipedia:Germany|German]] Star Wars Wiki) is founded in 2005.
*'''Oct 21''' – Star Wars Wiki ([[Wikipedia:French|French]] Star Wars Wiki) is founded in 2005.

==Other ''[[Star Wars]]'' events==
*'''Oct 17''' – [[Peter Mayhew]] becomes an [[Wikipedia:United States|American]] [[Wikipedia:Citizenship|citizen]].
*'''Oct 27''' – ''[[Star Wars: Where Science Meets Imagination]]'' opens at Museum of Science in [[Wikipedia:Boston|Boston]], [[Wikipedia:Massachusetts|Massachusetts]] in 2005.
*'''Oct 27''' – [[Star Wars Reunion II]] commences in [[Wikipedia:Paris|Paris]], [[Wikipedia:France|France]] in 2007.
